title: Set up Algolia full-text search in a Next.js project
summary: Install algoliasearch and react-instantsearch, index content, implement a search UI with autocomplete, and handle server-side search for SEO.
declaration: I will set up Algolia full-text search. This uses Algolia's hosted search service. If you want a self-hosted alternative (e.g., Meilisearch), say so before I begin.
